name: Ethara AI - Team Task Manager
description: Full-stack team collaboration and task management application
buildCommand: cd backend && npm install && npm run build

DATABASE_URL.description: Supabase PostgreSQL connection string. Get from: https://supabase.com → Project Settings → Database

JWT_SECRET.description: JWT secret key (min 32 chars). Generate: openssl rand -base64 32

CORS_ORIGIN.description: CORS origin (your Railway app URL). Example: https://ethara-ai-prod.railway.app
